'''thodhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labled|labled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labled|labled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thodhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhazithi|thodhazithi]] || [[word:thodhaziji|thodhaziji]] || [[word:thodhazishi|thodhazishi]] || [[word:thodhaziki|thodhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhazuthuthu|thodhazuthuthu]] || [[word:thodhazujuju|thodhazujuju]] || [[word:thodhazushushu|thodhazushushu]] || [[word:thodhazukuku|thodhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazuthu|thodhazuthu]] || [[word:thodhazuju|thodhazuju]] || [[word:thodhazushu|thodhazushu]] || [[word:thodhazuku|thodhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazufthuf|thodhazufthuf]] || [[word:thodhazufjuf|thodhazufjuf]] || [[word:thodhazufshuf|thodhazufshuf]] || [[word:thodhazufkuf|thodhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhazethe|thodhazethe]] || [[word:thodhazeje|thodhazeje]] || [[word:thodhazeshe|thodhazeshe]] || [[word:thodhazeke|thodhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhazothotho|thodhazothotho]] || [[word:thodhazojojo|thodhazojojo]] || [[word:thodhazoshosho|thodhazoshosho]] || [[word:thodhazokoko|thodhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazotho|thodhazotho]] || [[word:thodhazojo|thodhazojo]] || [[word:thodhazosho|thodhazosho]] || [[word:thodhazoko|thodhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazofthof|thodhazofthof]] || [[word:thodhazofjof|thodhazofjof]] || [[word:thodhazofshof|thodhazofshof]] || [[word:thodhazofkof|thodhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhazĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhazĂŠthĂŠ|thodhazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhazĂŠjĂŠ|thodhazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhazĂŠshĂŠ|thodhazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhazĂŠkĂŠ|thodhazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhazathatha|thodhazathatha]] || [[word:thodhazajaja|thodhazajaja]] || [[word:thodhazashasha|thodhazashasha]] || [[word:thodhazakaka|thodhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazatha|thodhazatha]] || [[word:thodhazaja|thodhazaja]] || [[word:thodhazasha|thodhazasha]] || [[word:thodhazaka|thodhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazafthaf|thodhazafthaf]] || [[word:thodhazafjaf|thodhazafjaf]] || [[word:thodhazafshaf|thodhazafshaf]] || [[word:thodhazafkaf|thodhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thodhazasha|thodhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhazshĂ«sha|thodhazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhazrosha|thodhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhazmusha|thodhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhazyasha|thodhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhaznkshĂ«sha|gothodhaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhaznkrosha|gothodhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhaznkmusha|gothodhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhaznkyasha|gothodhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thodhadhazasha|thodhadhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhadhazshĂ«sha|thodhadhazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhadhazrosha|thodhadhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhadhazmusha|thodhadhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhadhazyasha|thodhadhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhadhaznkshĂ«sha|gothodhadhaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhadhaznkrosha|gothodhadhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhadhaznkmusha|gothodhadhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhadhaznkyasha|gothodhadhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thedhĂŠzasha|thedhĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thedhĂŠzshĂ«sha|thedhĂŠzshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thedhĂŠzrosha|thedhĂŠzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thedhĂŠzmusha|thedhĂŠzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thedhĂŠzyasha|thedhĂŠzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠznkshĂ«sha|gothedhĂŠznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠznkrosha|gothedhĂŠznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠznkmusha|gothedhĂŠznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠznkyasha|gothedhĂŠznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thodhfazasha|thodhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhfazshĂ«sha|thodhfazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhfazrosha|thodhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhfazmusha|thodhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhfazyasha|thodhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhfaznkshĂ«sha|gothodhfaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhfaznkrosha|gothodhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhfaznkmusha|gothodhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhfaznkyasha|gothodhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
